reason: Two tasks (task-1775539719830, task-1775559026329) are blocked because PRD.md does not reflect current implementation. shell_exec tool and Python code_exec support were added as enhancements, and code_exec implementation changed from AsyncFunction to quickjs-emscripten. These gaps prevent milestone m9 and m10 completion.
proposedChange:
Update PRD.md Tools section:
1. Change 'code_exec — executes JS via AsyncFunction' to 'code_exec — executes JS/Python via quickjs-emscripten sandbox (browser-compatible)'
2. Add 'shell_exec — executes shell commands via agentic-shell'
3. Update code_exec description to mention Python support (Pyodide in browser, python3 in Node)
